description: A customer, 'Constructors Inc', has brought in an 'Industrial Power Drill' for an out-of-warranty repair. Log in to Odoo (admin@example.com / admin) and process a repair order based on the details in ~/Desktop/repair_ticket.txt. The repair requires adding a 'High-Capacity Battery' and 2 hours of 'Repair Labor'. Complete the repair process and generate a validated invoice for the customer that includes both the part and labor costs.
